descriptionInUI: Adds tower comms (taxi, takeoff, and landing sequencing with SRS voice or text subtitles) for human players at friendly land airbases. AI traffic flows through unaffected. Text subtitles are OFF by default (they show as on-screen messages); turn them on if you don't run SRS.

specificOptions.nameInUI: Max simultaneous AI landings (high = don't queue AI)
Max simultaneous AI taxiing (high = don't queue AI)
